name: Lemon Zucchini Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together lemon yogurt, egg, lemon zest, juice, sugar, and melted butter. Add this mixture to the dry ingredients. Stir until blended.
4. Fold in shredded zucchini and chopped walnuts.
5. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
6. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Allow the muffins to cool for 5 minutes before removing them from the wire rack.
